headline: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Cut As Analysts Trim Targets
summary: Analysts recently trimmed their modelled fair value estimate for Domino's Pizza from US$404.31 to US$392.46, a reduction of about 2.9% in the assessed intrinsic value. The change comes as research firms weigh softer traffic trends, pressure on lower income consumers, and a CEO transition against the brand’s survey based appeal and potential execution on sales initiatives. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the broader Domino's Pizza story and what to watch as the narrative...
